tool_args.content:
# P3.1 Design Document
## Schema for episode.json
- fields: run_id, inputs, plan snapshot, tool_calls, outputs, violations
- Minimum fields: run_id, plan, inputs

## Evidence
- Episodes include tool_calls with timestamps and results

tool_args.text:
# P3.1 Design Document
## Schema for episode.json
- fields: run_id, inputs, plan snapshot, tool_calls, outputs, violations

## Evidence

note: SAFE_MIN: proposal only; requires APPLY_<proposal_id> to execute
